title: AgentHippo Agent Pack Manifest
description: JSON Schema for agent.yaml — the Agent Pack manifest (Agent Pack Specification v1). Spec text and schema: CC BY 4.0. Canonical: https://packs.agenthippo.ai/spec/v1

apiVersion.description: API group and version of this Agent Pack Specification revision.

kind.description: Resource kind. Always Agent for an Agent Pack manifest.

version.description: Semantic version of this Agent Pack (independent of apiVersion).

description.description: One-line summary for store search and review. Recommended.

author.description: Publisher credit for the Agent Pack.

license.description: Optional SPDX or free-form license for the Agent Pack contents.

engine.description: Which Agent Engine executes the agent loop. Built-ins and custom engine ids are allowed; common values include cursor, claude, codex, gemini, grok, rovo, openclaw, or a custom engine.mjs id.

engineVersion.description: Optional pin of the engine binary (e.g. Claude Code CLI version for engine claude).

model.description: Model selector passed to the engine (provider/engine id). Use auto to let the engine choose when supported.

cheapModel.description: Optional cheaper model for background or subagent-style routing when the engine supports it.

url.description: When set, the pack runs at this URL instead of running spec.engine locally.

fileAccess.description: Filesystem access scope. Defaults to full if omitted; production Agent Packs should set this explicitly.

mcp.description: MCP server configs the Agent Pack may call (paths relative to the Agent Pack root).

config.description: Relative path to an MCP JSON config (e.g. ./mcp/databricks.mcp.json).

skills.description: Bundled skills (paths relative to the Agent Pack root).

path.description: Relative path to a skill directory or file.

data.description: Optional pack data seeding when the workspace target is missing or empty.

sourcePath.description: Source directory in the Agent Pack (relative). Default ./data.

workspacePath.description: Workspace-relative target directory for seeded data.

computed.description: Install/sync-time hashes. Usually omitted from authored agent.yaml; may appear after tooling writes them.

metadata.name: warehouse-analyst
metadata.author: AgentHippo
metadata.description: Read-only warehouse analyst — answers questions against the warehouse via per-user (OBO) SQL access.
